basics.name: Nithish Dasariraju
basics.label: Software Engineer
basics.summary: Entry-level Software Engineer with a strong foundation in computer science principles, proficient in Python, C, Java, and C++. Skilled in designing and developing scalable, distributed systems, and solving complex problems. Passionate about advancing cloud infrastructure innovations with a focus on secure, efficient, and optimized code.

work.company: Resource Pro Operational Solutions Pvt Ltd
work.summary: Streamlined insurance workflows and improved operational efficiency for agents, brokers, and insurance providers.
highlights: Reduced workflow execution time by 20% using cloud-based insurance solutions.
Managed over 300 policy transactions monthly with 100% compliance.
Achieved 98% accuracy in tracking and managing insurance workflows.

projects.name: AI-Powered EHR Management Platform

highlights: Enhanced prescription accuracy by 25% and reduced errors by 30%.
Developed a responsive UI with Salesforce Lightning Web Components.
